texto: There are worse things than having behaved foolishly in public.There are worse things than these miniature betrayals,committed or endured or suspected; there are worse thingsthan not being able to sleep for thinking about them.It is 5 a.m. All the worse things come stalking inand stand icily about the bed looking worse and worse and worse.
explicacao: Citação de Fleur Adcock sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There are worse things than having behaved foolishly in public.There are worse things than these …” articula reflexao, haunted, insomnia em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e insomnia.
